identity.name: Zhenwei Seo
identity.headline: Zhenwei SEO
identity.summary: DevOps-focused engineer with 17+ years in backend development, experienced in building scalable systems and modernizing legacy applications. I am transitioning into cloud and DevOps by working with AWS, Docker, Terraform, and CI/CD practices to improve automation, deployment workflows, and platform reliability.

terminal.title: visitor@zhenwei.dev - portfolio
welcomeLines: Type a command or use the command deck to inspect profile, contact, and work skills.

about.title: About
about.kicker: Backend depth, DevOps focus, cloud delivery.
paragraphs: I’m a software engineer with 17+ years of experience in backend development, specializing in building reliable APIs and scalable systems using Java and Spring-based technologies.

In recent years, I’ve been expanding into DevOps and Cloud Engineering, working hands-on with AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and Infrastructure as Code. My focus is on improving automation, deployment workflows, and building reliable, production-ready cloud systems.

I hold certifications including AWS Certified Solutions Architect Associate, AWS Certified Developer Associate, Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA), and HashiCorp Certified: Terraform Associate, reflecting my commitment to developing practical skills in cloud and infrastructure technologies.
I have a strong interest in AWS cloud architecture and enjoy exploring how services integrate to build scalable, resilient, and cost-efficient systems.
This portfolio is built as a practical DevOps showcase, demonstrating how I apply Terraform-managed infrastructure, CI/CD practices, and cloud-native architecture in real-world projects.

contact.title: Contact
contact.message: Interested in DevOps, cloud infrastructure, or platform engineering work? Let us connect.
